title: selaginella singalanensis
intro: Selaginella singalanensis, also known as the Singalan spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Selaginella singalanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
